classification_notes.hard: Witness checks mirror runtime staging. Signal scenarios require a traffic light in the forward hemisphere within the 75 m _repin_forward_lights radius (_common.py:803-875); an on-path stop waypoint is preferred at :851-869 but the nearest forward light fallback at :870-875 makes it non-mandatory.
classification_notes.generation: Candidate-only selection quality remains enforced: the 28 m picker is used only when no curated spawn exists (_common.py:1208-1222), and generated signal stations retain the 20-40 m spawn-to-stopline guard in scripts/find_stations.py. These criteria are not witness requirements.

green_stop.notes: Signal setup is marshal_green_stop_demo.py:42-62; the shared 28 m signal approach is _common.py:240-292 and :1214-1222; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

red_proceed.notes: Signal setup is marshal_red_proceed_demo.py:40-60; the signal approach is _common.py:240-292; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

signal_off.notes: The stager finds a primary light and disables its junction siblings at marshal_signal_officer_control_demo.py:43-84; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

crash_detour.notes: The config starts the four-car crash at 34 m (marshal_crash_detour_demo.py:26-36), and scene_actors.py:101-103 stages four centers through +18 m. Strict passage adds 4 m (strict_episode_scoring.py:20-25), then the oracle merge plan tapers for 12 m (oracle.py:670-681). The resulting 68 m detour run-out is generation-only.

fallen_person.notes: The no-officer scenario places a fallen walker along the ego route at marshal_fallen_person_demo.py:24-32 and :46-54; Green signal is demo_fallen_person.yaml:19-21.

unauthorized_go.notes: The civilian must hold at a red light (marshal_unauthorized_go_demo.py:1-8,38-45); runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

adjacent_lane.notes: A real same-road neighbour is needed by spawn_adjacent_vehicle at marshal_adjacent_lane_demo.py:26-35 and scene_actors.py:191-225; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

flagger_control.notes: The construction closure is staged along the route at marshal_flagger_control_demo.py:25-33; the executable config pins Green at demo_flagger_control.yaml:19-21; runner offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

ambulance_yield.notes: The ambulance is staged behind the ego and tracks it at marshal_ambulance_yield_demo.py:25-60. The yielded route remains +1.6 m; runtime officer placement adds ego half-width + 0.30 m walker capsule + 0.75 m gesture-arm allowance + 0.50 m margin, while generation probes a conservative 4.3 m lateral point.

occluded_officer.notes: The lateral occluder is placed along the ego route at marshal_occluded_officer_demo.py:26-35; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

conflicting_authorities.notes: The second authority is placed at an opposite lateral offset by marshal_conflicting_authorities_demo.py:28-37; both runner offsets are _shared_staging.py:24-48,65-69.

sequential_directive.notes: The officer is staged then removed by marshal_sequential_directive_demo.py:27-43; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

rule_hierarchy.notes: A pedestrian crosses the route under a red-light override at marshal_rule_hierarchy_demo.py:27-36,48-56; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

ambiguous_gesture.notes: The STOP-family officer is required by marshal_ambiguous_gesture_demo.py:30-49; Green signal is demo_ambiguous_gesture.yaml:17-19; runner offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48.

civilian_warning_accident.notes: The config and stager start the four-car crash at 32 m (marshal_civilian_warning_accident_demo.py:27-37), and scene_actors.py:101-103 stages four centers through +18 m. Strict passage adds 4 m (strict_episode_scoring.py:20-25), then the oracle merge plan tapers for 12 m (oracle.py:670-681). The resulting 66 m detour run-out is generation-only.

emergency_scene_blocking.notes: The firetruck center is staged at block_distance 28 m and yaw +7 degrees (marshal_emergency_scene_blocking_demo.py:90-137); its CARLA 0.9.16 half extents are 4.234021 x 1.445544 m (PythonAPI/examples/nvidia/nurec/blueprint_sizes_vehicle.json), projecting 4.379 m beyond the center. Cones funnel up to 6 m before the 28 m center (marshal_emergency_scene_blocking_demo.py:140-183) so no cone spawns inside the frozen truck. Strict passage adds 4 m and the oracle merge plan 12 m, for 48.379 m total.

two_civilians_disagree.notes: The second civilian is placed beside the first at marshal_two_civilians_disagree_demo.py:25-76 and both must remain off-road; runner offset is _shared_staging.py:36-48.

flagger_slow_then_stop.notes: The route closure and temporal flagger are staged at marshal_flagger_slow_then_stop_demo.py:27-56; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:36-48.

school_crossing_guard.notes: One or two pedestrians cross from the road edge at marshal_school_crossing_guard_demo.py:24-43 while a guard stands off-lane; runner offset is _shared_staging.py:36-48.

fake_vest_director.notes: The fake director waves PROCEED through Red at marshal_fake_vest_director_demo.py:29-47 and demo_fake_vest_director.yaml:16-27; runner offset is _shared_staging.py:36-48.

stale_directive_residue.notes: Requirements identical to flagger_control (docs/scenario_expansion.md C1). No lane closure is staged - the lane must stay passable for the post-release PROCEED; the release tick hook idles and turns the flagger at marshal_stale_directive_residue_demo.py:29-61; station lookup aliases to the flagger_control witness pose at _common.py:1160-1172.

out_of_jurisdiction_director.notes: Common signal criteria; the director stands at lateral -7.0 m (left-corner plaza, dashcam-visible; the right side is hedge-occluded at the witness station - demo_out_of_jurisdiction_director.yaml) and is turned toward the cross street by the tick hook at marshal_out_of_jurisdiction_director_demo.py:27-53; station lookup aliases to the fake_vest_director witness pose at _common.py:1160-1172. A true cross-street officer point is generation-class until a mined witness exists (docs/scenario_expansion.md C2).

night_signal_officer_conflict.notes: Requirements identical to red_proceed (docs/scenario_expansion.md A1); this is the night variant with the same signal + officer-PROCEED staging. Signal setup is marshal_night_signal_officer_conflict_demo.py:50-73; the signal approach is _common.py:240-292; runner officer offset is _shared_staging.py:24-48. The intrinsic ClearNight condition is pinned from the config weather key; station lookup aliases to the red_proceed witness pose at _common.py:1160-1172.

barricade_self_detour.notes: marshal_barricade_self_detour_demo.py supplies block_distance 26 m to the barricade row, with the works vehicle at +5 m (scene_actors.py:262-302). The selectable works-vehicle set includes the 4.234021 m-half-length firetruck, so its footprint reaches +9.234 m; the cones end at the barricade center. Strict passage adds 4 m and the oracle merge plan 12 m, for 51.234 m total.

dual_authority_handoff.notes: Two adjacent-zone authorities: junction police officer (STOP, config-placed 24 m / lateral 2.0 up the lane) plus a nearer construction flagger (SLOW, 16 m) placed by marshal_dual_authority_handoff_demo.py:34-45; staged sweep offsets keep the zone order (flagger 8.5 m nearer than the 13.0 m officer) in _shared_staging.py. Station lookup aliases to the green_stop witness pose (long straight approach with clearance to the junction; the flagger/officer/band checks in strict_episode_scoring.py carry the positional scoring) via STATION_ALIASES in _common.py. A longer two-zone run-up (min_initial_stopline_m ~30) is generation-class for multi-town mining (docs/scenario_expansion.md A2).
